name: nanoPencil print mode
summary: Non-interactive batch mode for scripting/CI, outputs text or JSON lines.
detail: Implemented in `modes/print-mode.ts`. Runs without TUI, binds extensions, sends prompts, fires `session_shutdown`, and flushes stdout. CLI: `npx tsx cli.ts --print "prompt"` or `--json` for event stream.
content: Implemented in `modes/print-mode.ts`. Runs without TUI, binds extensions, sends prompts, fires `session_shutdown`, and flushes stdout. CLI: `npx tsx cli.ts --print "prompt"` or `--json` for event stream.

name: Trim mem-core package size
summary: Removed "src" from mem-core's package.json "files" array, cutting tarball size by 34%.
detail: mem-core was 263K (7x larger than next package) because package.json shipped 39 .ts source files. Removed "src" from "files" array. Reduced size to 172K and removed 39 files. dist/*.d.ts and *.js.map remain for consumers/debugging.
content: mem-core was 263K (7x larger than next package) because package.json shipped 39 .ts source files. Removed "src" from "files" array. Reduced size to 172K and removed 39 files. dist/*.d.ts and *.js.map remain for consumers/debugging.

name: nanoPencil print mode
summary: nanoPencil's `--mode print` enables non-interactive batch processing via stdin/stdout.
detail: Designed for scripting and CI pipelines. Reads prompts from stdin, outputs to stdout. Key flags: `--jsonl` for structured output, `-m` for prompt text, `--model` to specify LLM.
content: Designed for scripting and CI pipelines. Reads prompts from stdin, outputs to stdout. Key flags: `--jsonl` for structured output, `-m` for prompt text, `--model` to specify LLM.
